abilities.description: You carry a relic of eldritch power. Envision its form and nature. When you make a move wielding or aided by this object, use a D8 relic die as your action die. If you roll a 1 on that die, the powers backfire; in addition to the outcome of the move, @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.905205c073b09eac]{Endure Harm} (-3) or @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} (-3). If you are separated from the relic, this asset counts as an impact.
When you roll a 7 or 8 on your relic die, you are one with the eldritch powers of the relic. Take an automatic strong hit and +1 momentum.

When you successfully @UUID[Compendium.foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.985a5415860a99e9]{Fulfill Your Vow} in a quest (extreme or epic) to free yourself of the relic, activate this ability at no cost, make a final roll of the relic die, and discard this asset. On 3–8, you embody lingering powers of the relic; improve a stat by +1. On 1–2, improve a stat by +1, but the relic leaves a mark; reduce your max health or spirit to 4.
